description: Event representing a handoff between agents.

from_agent.description: Name of the agent handing off control
from_agent.title: From Agent

to_agent.description: Name of the agent receiving control
to_agent.title: To Agent

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when the handoff occurred
timestamp.title: Timestamp

tools_removed.description: Whether tools were removed from conversation history
tools_removed.title: Tools Removed

title: HandoffEvent
